PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX geof: <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?station ?stationLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q5520713 wdt:P625 ?gandhiCoord .
  ?station wdt:P31 / wdt:P279 * wd:Q257606 ; wdt:P131 wd:Q673 ; wdt:P625 ?stationCoord .
  BIND(geof:distance(?gandhiCoord , ?stationCoord) AS ?distance)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?station rdfs:label ?stationLabel
    FILTER(lang(?stationLabel) = "en")
    .
  }
}
ORDER BY ASC(?distance)
LIMIT 1
